title: How can I access the internal signals of Verilog module from C++ testbench?
body:
As the title, if we have a pointer of top Verilog design (e.g dut), how the internal signals of sub-module instances are access with the pointer? I trace the C++ class which is verilated from the top Verilog module, it seems only exposing the inports and outports for access, therefore, I guess there might be derivative or compiler options for Verilator that allows accessing the design hierarchy. I am using verilator version 4.224

I also used  /*verilator public*/ for the internal signals of Verilog module but it is raising the compilation error
`logic zz_valid /*verilator public*/;`

Any help is very appreciated!

Thanks
